nasb.text: So they divided the land between them to survey it; Ahab went one way by himself and Obadiah went another way by himself.

esv.text: So they divided the land between them to pass through it. Ahab went in one direction by himself, and Obadiah went in another direction by himself.

cnv.text: 於是他們分地巡視。亞哈獨自走一路，俄巴底獨自走另一路。

ccb.text: 于是，亚哈和俄巴底分头到不同地区寻找。
